items.claim: Chase Hooper missed weight for his upcoming fight.
items.quote: it's a sure thing that he missed weight.

items.claim: Mitch Ramirez is winless in the UFC.
items.quote: his opponent is winless in the UFC

items.claim: Mitch Ramirez has been knocked out in both of his UFC fights.
Chase Hooper has been finished in his last two fights.
items.quote: Chase Hooper had been finished in his last two fights as well.

items.claim: Chase Hooper has operated at a higher level in his career than Mitch Ramirez.
items.quote: we've seen Chase Hooper do things at, you know, operate at a higher level than we've seen Mitch Ramirez operate at in his career thus far.

items.claim: Tabitha Ricci is the toughest opponent Fatim Klene has faced in her career.
items.quote: Richi is uh the toughest test by far that that Klein has faced.

items.claim: Fatim Klene is undefeated at strawweight.
Fatim Klene's UFC debut loss was mitigated by the fact that she fought up a weight class on short notice.
items.quote: she lost in her debut to Jasmine Jazdicious fighting up a weight class on short notice
